judge_reason: Description B quotes specific, verbatim text from stamps and dates that Description A does not mention and instead calls the text 'illegible'.
original_image_tags: Aged, yellowed paper with a torn upper-left corner and two punch holes at the top. The paper contains heavily faded, illegible typed text and several stamped markings in blue ink at the bottom.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A faded scanned page of a typed government document, with two punched binder holes at the top, several blue circular “RECEIVED INTERNAL SECURITY” date stamps near the bottom, and faint handwritten marks in the lower left.*
